textByHashes.c077689f2eded150a49c35c99d4df71debd36b16: I'm afraid it isn't sea worthy, it's full of holes. To fill the holes I'll need some swamp paste.
textByHashes.d3ecbcb1d636d1f23fb4f6cc1fa51fdaee33bd89: Yes, swamp tar mixed with flour and heated over a fire.
textByHashes.89d127f3ec48875d6b4e5ca92bb7d13f93936cc2: In fact, unless me nose be mistaken, you've got some in yer pack.
textByHashes.3364684f8ab00f49de40bec8f3d682ac2216a8fe: Right me hearty. Let's get this boat fixed.
textByHashes.1087ad907c4a1cf7db70083df45c6a3fe02706b4: Huzzah! We've fixed the leaky old tub.
textByHashes.7289770e8bfca20f8eed39b1a46c6292b8517eed: Unfortunately the only supply of swamp tar is in the swamps below Lumbridge. It's too far for an old man like me to travel.
textByHashes.907de8d61995c30dd32981c9fb9793539d6f5d50: If you make me some swamp paste I'll give you a ride in my boat.
textByHashes.471a9b7fcf8237f151b39f9ebb0d8d8217763a6e: Hello m'hearty. Did you manage to make some swamp paste?
textByHashes.8e98573e4f7bc3ec5b965693bc94b01f1d3b9979: It's simply swamp tar mixed with flour heated over a fire. Unfortunately the only supply of swamp tar is in the swamps below Lumbridge.
textByHashes.a88345d076f465cf613185af58b9ebc3dfd278a7: I can't fix my row boat without it.
textByHashes.56e087f13f82f91169d4cda5b84f95ae60f6f72e: Hello again land lover. There's some strange goings on, on that platform, I tell you.
textByHashes.980d89b68c7be72471b77f73300d9550383212c9: Of course m'hearty. If that's what you want.
textByHashes.0b132e685a31ec12153b61a32c66f6d1335d2357: Have you had enough of this place yet? It's really starting to scare me.
textByHashes.22c12f467a2d0ea750997ec977b7e3969c102ad7: You're telling me, none of the sailors seem to remember who I am.
textByHashes.d7536cd6263353007f84e8834051fc2a041c659b: That's a worry, no-one's heard from him on shore. Come on, we'd better go look for him.
textByHashes.6da79caf55bc947e0ea1a307a7d09a7ea765c883: Someway off mainland still. You'd better see if me old matey's okay.
textByHashes.804f23e99a1435bc3ee570efecea201aee9b7ddf: You're right. It all sounds pretty creepy.
textByHashes.4c39596c46aefbd0ccb6531a35a65bf604f38bcf: Yes, he's safe and sound with his parents. Your turn to return to land now adventurer.
textByHashes.7f554382c4c9c7b2ac7b947caef611dd84b7fe15: Well, hello again m'hearty. How're yer fare?
textByHashes.8e38d907ab23b35e19341d3bf6c0dba9dbb997e9: 'Fraid not lad. I've been washed up and left to dry.
textByHashes.e88358abca26024b5923e62d1856547ffd57e85e: 'Fraid not lass. I've been washed up and left to dry.
textByHashes.1b44ab593246e41a6769ed673315a5fe34d7bcfe: Scuppered I am, keelhauled and bottomed out.
textByHashes.3d4386b0f88844bc6141982ad352ffc23ec4b04e: I'm destitute. I can sail no more.
textByHashes.bc44de49a7a88ac410bd497418288541be292754: About two weeks ago, I was hauled up in front of the Mayor and he tells me I've broken his new 'Articles of sailing'.
textByHashes.9e8c462197e2efc3799e4b1aac3437030e0b0e7b: He tells me that under his new laws my boat is forfeit.
textByHashes.9090dfae3e34944fe52cb15db1722eafe0c0a3e3: Aye. The Mayor has given it to Jeb Wormwood. He is running the boat to the Fishing Platform now.
textByHashes.190562a77afe1015185174d42d414b1d35cbe60a: Speaking of which, since you were last there it's got a might bit stranger. You really should take a look.
textByHashes.ca7bb7e7a6a9259e2ce48a93dec55d6d291a7ecd: I don't know what to do without my boat.
textByHashes.f38da56761a03d47fbc88b9fef4efe1383347525: Well hello. Beautiful day isn't it.
textByHashes.994a90c1e19b6778db53ea28ea92d1b654221157: Just smell that sea air... beautiful.
